relevant_files.summary: Defines 20 blind-box scene entries, four item pools, compatibility mapping, and runtime BLIND_BOXES.
Asserts each scene has four pool keys, each pool has 50 unique items, and scene_expansion_items feeds runtime large.
Requires scene expansion items to be recognizable, bounded, independently circleable, and not dependent on light/reflection/transparent/tiny traces.

existing_patterns.description: The compatibility layer treats core_items and scene_expansion_items as large runtime items.

existing_patterns.pattern: fixed 20 scenes x 4 pools x 50 unique items
existing_patterns.description: Any implementation must preserve pool names and item counts unless tests and docs are intentionally updated.
Many scene_expansion_items repeat suffixes like 柜, 车, 置物架, 分层架, 桌, 台, 箱.

architecture_constraints: Do not modify source files in this brainstorming session.
If later implemented, keep BLIND_BOX_ITEM_POOL_BUNDLES schema stable unless intentionally refactoring tests and docs.
Avoid candidates containing blocked visual patterns such as 透明, 反光, 发光, 微小, 细线, 阴影.

recent_sessions.note: Relevant previous work on blind-box pool correction.
Established 20 scenes and current library structure.

key_findings: The user-visible problem is amplified because scene_expansion_items are part of runtime large items.
The current pool heavily uses furniture/storage infrastructure nouns, which creates placement burden.
A safer replacement direction is medium-small, blocky scene anchors: trays, boxes, card stands, labels, pads, kits, pouches, bundles.
